description_long: This object is an ornate flower with a metallic, silver ring structure encircling a central floral arrangement. The flower features prominent, purple petals radiating from the center, surrounded by smaller, translucent and black petal-like elements. Blue and white crystalline structures are interspersed among the petals, giving the flower a jeweled, decorative appearance. The overall design is highly stylized, with a mix of geometric and organic forms, and the metallic ring adds a modern, sculptural touch. There is no visible stem or leaves, and the flower appears to be suspended or supported by the ring. The surface is glossy and reflective, suggesting a combination of metal and glass or crystal materials.
description: A decorative flower with purple petals, blue and white crystal accents, and a shiny silver ring encircling the arrangement. The design is ornate, glossy, and highly stylized.
description_view_0: Front view shows the central purple petals, blue and white crystal details, and the full silver ring encircling the flower.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the layered arrangement of petals and crystals, with the silver ring appearing more elliptical.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the black and blue elements, with the purple petals partially visible and the ring structure prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the distribution of crystal and petal elements, with the silver ring curving around the arrangement.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial configuration, with the main purple petals forming a central whorl surrounded by smaller, overlapping translucent and black petal-like structures. The arrangement is symmetrical and layered, with crystalline elements interspersed among the petals.
